content:
Uranus in Sagittarius: Meaning, Traits & Crystals

Uranus in Sagittarius blends the archetypal drive of Uranus (where you seek change, break rules, and awaken) with the Fire, mutable nature of Sagittarius.

  • Planet: Uranus — change, innovation, rebellion, awakening, freedom
  • Sign: Sagittarius (Fire/Mutable) — exploration, freedom, philosophy, optimism, truth

Eastern Perspective
